ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "land_area_km2" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "hdi" REAL /* Human Development Index */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Global happiness ranking */,
  "governance_quality" REAL /* Quality of governance index */,
  "environmental_index" REAL /* Environmental sustainability index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the indicator in the overall well-being score */,
  "source_reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_indicators" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the value is recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for the country in the given year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the indicator value */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data (0-1) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_indicators_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source (1-5) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for automated data retrieval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_sources" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was last updated */,
  "retrieval_method" TEXT /* Method of data retrieval (e.g., API, Manual) */,
  "last_retrieved" TEXT /* Date when the data was last retrieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_sources_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
